{{Infobox location
| name = Murrok
| introduced = The Engineer
}}

''See also: [[Murrok Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Murrok refers to both an independent planet and a specific individual. The planet is characterized as an extremely harsh environment, rivaling [[Dornoth IV]] for the title of the most inhospitable world in the galaxy. It maintains minimal connections to the wider galaxy and is known for a legend involving an ancient dark moon that disappeared nearly a millennium ago. The inhabitants of the planet prefer trading tangible commodities, such as ships, plants used for terraforming, and low-grade [[Aethertech]] water purifiers, rather than accepting services. The individual Murrok is a being with [[diamond]] eyes and a beard of smoke, capable of producing sounds like humming or rumbling. He is highly sensitive to perceived disrespect and has expressed interest in the location of the [[Shadow Ark]], as well as a desire to see a specific golden individual in distress.}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Murrok is an independent planet located within the [[Free Worlds]] that was first identified as a destination by [[Mell]]. [[Horizon]] sought to follow this lead, eventually discovering an inhospitable [[World Spirit]] that rivals [[Dornoth IV]] as the galaxy's worst planet. The world is characterized by toxic volcanic clouds, brown sludge oceans, and primarily insectoid native [[life]], with humans residing in twenty-eight arcologies across three continents. As a sentient entity, Murrok possesses eyes of large diamonds, teeth made of pale stone, and a tongue of soil. During its encounter with the Advocates, the planet remarked that they were unaware of what they possessed regarding the [[Shadow Ark]].}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">13</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Murrok]] is an independent planet in the [[Free Worlds]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c19">''The Engineer'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Murrok]] is a destination mentioned by [[Mell]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Murrok]] is a lead that [[Horizon]] wants to follow.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c23">''The Engineer'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Murrok]] is an inhospitable planet that challenges [[Dornoth IV]]'s title of 'worst planet in the galaxy'.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c29">''The Engineer'', chapter 29</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Murrok]]'s atmosphere is filled with toxic clouds from volcanoes on every continent.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c29" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The oceans of [[Murrok]] are a dull, brown sludge.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c29" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|The native [[life]]-forms of [[Murrok]] are mostly insectoid.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c29" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Murrok]]'s human population is concentrated in twenty-eight arcologies located in tower-cities on its three continents.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c29" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Murrok]] is a [[World Spirit]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c29" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Murrok]] has eyes made of large diamonds.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c29" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Murrok]] has teeth of pale stone and a tongue of soil.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c29" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Murrok]] is a planet.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c29" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Murrok]] stated that the Advocates do not know what they have regarding the [[Shadow Ark]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c30">''The Engineer'', chapter 30</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
[[Category:Regions]]
